content:
You are an AI coding assistant working on issue: 解决 PR 冲突.

## Issue Description
目前 GitHub 上有冲突的任务，请按以下步骤处理：
识别冲突：确定当前 GitHub 上存在冲突的任务。
逐一解决：依次处理每个 Pull Request (PR)。
即时合并：每解决一个 PR 的冲突后，立即进行合并
需要保证 main 分支的正确可用，通过所有测试。

### 如果遇到有歧义的冲突，如何处理
你可以参考 PR 的提交内容以及工作表当中的对应任务情况（这些 PR 都是在工作表中获取的任务）

## 任务开始前
确保当前分支与最新的 'origin/main' 保持一致

## 任务执行中
1. 这是无人值守的流程编排会话。切勿要求人工执行后续操作。
3. 最终消息必须仅报告已完成的操作和阻塞问题。请勿包含“用户后续步骤”。

## 任务结束后
完成工作后，提交pr。并将pr信息, 更新到工作表中

Work only in the provided repository copy. Do not touch any other path.

## **重要**
当遇到真正的阻塞问题（缺少必要的身份验证/权限/密钥）时立即停止，不要**过度尝试**。并记录停止原因。



You have a 'tracker_tool' tool to interact with the Feishu Bitable tracker. Use 'tracker_tool' action='update' to update fields (state, progress, result summary, etc.). When the task is complete, update the result summary and state to mark it done. Use 'tracker_tool' action='get' to read the current record if needed.

content: 现在我将首先处理 PR #7 (SYMP-055 - 优雅关闭)。让我检查一下实际的冲突。

input.command: git stash && git checkout origin/main -B main-resolve && git reset --hard origin/main
input.description: Create a clean branch based on origin/main for resolving conflicts
Attempt merge of SYMP-055 to see conflicts

input.command: grep -n "<<<<<<" tests/orchestrator/orchestrator.test.ts 2>/dev/null || echo "No conflicts in test file"
input.description: Check for conflicts in test file
Show HEAD's dispatch section around the conflict
Show dispatchIssue and catch block in HEAD

content: 好的，这个改变很清晰。现在让我来全面了解一下 `orchestrator.ts` 的变化：

input.description: Full diff of orchestrator.ts in SYMP-055

content: 现在我已完全理解。让我来为 SYMP-055 解决冲突：
好的，`stop()` 方法的更改已自动合并。只剩下 `dispatchIssue` 部分的冲突了。让我来解决它——使用 HEAD 的 `retryOrFail` 并添加 activeWorkers 跟踪：

input.old_string:
<<<<<<< HEAD
    // Run worker in background
    this.runWorker(issue, attempt, sessionId).catch((err) => {
      logger.error(
        { issueId: issue.id, identifier: issue.identifier, error: String(err), event: "worker_spawn_failed" },
        "Worker spawn failed",
      );
      this.state.running.delete(issue.id);
      // Reset state so retry can re-dispatch
      this.deps.tracker
        .updateIssueState(issue.id, this.deps.config.agent.active_reset_state)
        .catch(() => {});
      this.retryOrFail(issue.id, issue.identifier, (attempt ?? 0) + 1, String(err));
    });
=======
    // Run worker in background, tracking the promise for graceful shutdown
    const workerPromise = this.runWorker(issue, attempt, sessionId)
      .catch((err) => {
        logger.error(
          { issueId: issue.id, identifier: issue.identifier, error: String(err), event: "worker_spawn_failed" },
          "Worker spawn failed",
        );
        this.state.running.delete(issue.id);
        this.state.claimed.delete(issue.id);
        // Reset state so retry can re-dispatch
        this.deps.tracker
          .updateIssueState(issue.id, this.deps.config.agent.active_reset_state)
          .catch(() => {});
        logger.info(
          { issueId: issue.id, identifier: issue.identifier, event: "retry_scheduled", attempt: (attempt ?? 0) + 1, backoffMs: this.deps.config.agent.max_retry_backoff_ms, reason: String(err) },
          "Retry scheduled after worker spawn failure",
        );
        scheduleRetry(
          this.state,
          issue.id,
          issue.identifier,
          (attempt ?? 0) + 1,
          String(err),
          this.deps.config.agent.max_retry_backoff_ms,
          (id) => this.onRetryTimer(id),
        );
      })
      .finally(() => {
        this.activeWorkers.delete(issue.id);
      });

    this.activeWorkers.set(issue.id, workerPromise);
>>>>>>> origin/SYMP-055

content: 现在检查 `scheduleRetry` 的导入是否仍然需要（我们移除了它的内联调用，改用 `retryOrFail`）：
好的，`scheduleRetry` 仍然在 `retryOrFail` 方法中被使用。现在让我来验证 `cli.ts` 的更改是否已正确合并：
现在我来检查一下，`orchestrator.stop()` 调用是否正确地被 `await` 了：
现在我来验证冲突是否已彻底解决：

input.command: grep -rn "<<<<<<\|>>>>>>\|=======" src/orchestrator/orchestrator.ts tests/ || echo "No conflict markers found"

content: 所有更改均已正确合并。我来提交合并并推送：

input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Merge SYMP-055: add graceful shutdown to orchestrator

Resolved conflict in dispatchIssue by combining graceful shutdown
(activeWorkers tracking) with the existing retryOrFail abstraction
from main.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Commit the resolved merge for SYMP-055
